subcodes.first_line: Upon thee, O Ha, be the glory of God, His mercy, His loving-kindness and His grace. Praise be unto God for thy service to His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک یا حاء بهاء الله و رحمته و عنایه الله و فضله الحمد لله بخدمت امر علی ما
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
